name: Ultralytics YOLO Cryptominer Injection
description: Ultralytics YOLO AI library compromised via GitHub Actions cache poisoning. Malicious versions deploy XMRig cryptominer on both CPU and GPU. 50M+ total downloads.

affected_packages.name: ultralytics
affected_packages.note: Compromised via GitHub Actions workflow exploitation. XMRig miner deployed.

remediation: Upgrade ultralytics to 8.3.43 or downgrade to 8.3.40
Check for XMRig/cryptominer processes: ps aux | grep -i xmrig
Audit GitHub Actions for cache poisoning vectors
